summary.business_type: Personal Portfolio / Freelance Developer — Full Stack (Davao City, Philippines + Global)
top_findings: Only 3 of 23 sitemap pages are indexed by Google — all key service pages invisible to search
4 pages have valid schema in compiled out/ but not served live — stale deployment
All 5 service/regional pages have duplicate brand suffix in title tags (Next.js metadata template bug)
Crypto/DePIN airdrop blog post is active QRG trust liability on portfolio domain
/about/ and /projects/ pages return 404 — nav links and portfolio CTAs lead to dead ends
quick_wins: Request indexing via Google Search Console for top 5 service pages (30 min)
Redeploy build to restore schema on 4 missing pages (10 min, zero code)
Fix title.template in layout.tsx to remove duplicate brand suffix (1 hour)
Add HTTP security headers via Cloudflare _headers file (30 min)
Filter blog feed to remove crypto/off-topic posts (30 min)

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: HTTPS enforced with HTTP→HTTPS 301 redirect
www→non-www canonical redirect in place
Trailing slash consistency on all URLs
All 19 sitemap URLs return HTTP 200
meta robots: index, follow on all audited pages
Self-referencing canonical tags on all pages
Exactly 1 H1 per page
Viewport meta tag present
0 images missing alt text
Open Graph tags present
HTML lang='en' on all pages
No redirect chains (all resolve in 1 hop)
Clean hyphenated URL structure

findings.title: Duplicate Brand Suffix in Title Tags
findings.description: All 5 service/regional pages render '| Alger Makiputin | Alger Makiputin' due to Next.js metadata template concatenation bug. 3 pages exceed 60 chars even without the duplicate.
findings.recommendation: In layout.tsx title.template, remove brand suffix from individual page metadata.title fields so the template appends it only once.

findings.title: Zero HTTP Security Headers
findings.description: No HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, CSP, Referrer-Policy, or Permissions-Policy present despite Cloudflare CDN usage.
findings.recommendation: Add headers to Cloudflare _headers file or via Transform Rules.

findings.title: 13-15 Render-Blocking Scripts in <head>
findings.description: All pages have 13-15 synchronous script tags in <head> with no defer or async. Direct LCP/FCP contributor, estimated 300-600ms penalty on 4G mobile.
findings.recommendation: Use next/script with strategy='afterInteractive' for all non-critical scripts.

findings.title: Blog Page Returns No Article Links
findings.description: Blog index renders with 0 crawlable article links. Blog articles are orphaned — Googlebot cannot discover them.
findings.recommendation: Convert blog listing to SSR/SSG or add individual article URLs to sitemap.

findings.title: Sitemap lastmod Bulk-Stamped
findings.description: All 19 URLs share identical timestamp 2026-07-02T18:38:07.243Z. Google ignores bulk-generated lastmod values.
findings.recommendation: Generate lastmod from actual file Last-Modified headers in next-sitemap.config.js.

findings.title: No BreadcrumbList Schema
findings.description: No BreadcrumbList structured data on any page. Missed free SERP enhancement.
findings.recommendation: Add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD to all service and regional pages.

findings.title: Blog Listing Images Missing Dimensions
findings.description: 9 of 11 blog listing images have no width/height attributes. CLS contributor.
findings.recommendation: Use Next.js <Image> component which enforces dimensions automatically.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Concrete, specific statistics (8+ years, 40+ projects, 25+ clients, 40%+ perf improvement)
Industry specificity is strong (POS/barcode retail, Stripe/PayPal ecommerce, role-based banking)
Technical vocabulary is accurate and appropriately deep
Pricing transparency on landing pages (₱30,000 start / $2,000 start)
Unique local vs. offshore differentiation between Davao and Philippines pages
/web-developer-davao/ is the best-structured page on the site (72/100)

findings.title: Crypto/DePIN Airdrop Post in Blog Index
findings.description: 'Don't Miss the Next Big DePIN Airdrop: How to Earn Free $3DOS Tokens Today!' is surfaced on the professional portfolio domain. Active QRG trust liability.
findings.recommendation: Filter Medium RSS feed to technical content only. Remove all finance/crypto/collectibles category posts from blog index immediately.

findings.title: /about/ Page Returns 404
findings.description: Nav 'About' link points to non-existent URL. Most important missing E-E-A-T page on the site.
findings.recommendation: Create src/app/about/page.tsx with professional bio, career timeline, credentials, and social links.

findings.title: /projects/ Returns 404
findings.description: All 'View My Work' CTAs across the site link to a non-existent URL. Portfolio evidence unavailable.
findings.recommendation: Build /projects/ or /case-studies/ with at minimum 3 detailed case studies with measurable outcomes.

findings.title: /web-development-services/ Thin Content
findings.description: 645 words — below 800-word minimum for a primary service page. No pricing, FAQ, or process section. One unnamed case study in 3 sentences.
findings.recommendation: Expand to 800+ words. Add pricing section, 4-step process, 5-question FAQ, one named case study.

findings.title: Blog Topical Scatter
findings.description: Blog describes 'full stack development insights' but 2026 posts include pickleball, One Piece collectibles, RPG apps, and crypto airdrops.
findings.recommendation: Filter feed to technical posts only, or relabel blog as 'Personal Writing' and de-emphasize in portfolio nav.

findings.title: No Privacy Policy
findings.description: No privacy policy linked anywhere despite contact forms collecting data. QRG baseline trust requirement.
findings.recommendation: Create /privacy-policy/ and link from footer.

findings.title: Testimonials Unverifiable
findings.description: Carlos R., Ian A., Arnel S. — first name + initial only, no company name, no website.
findings.recommendation: Add business names (with permission) and at least one LinkedIn/website link.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: All schema uses JSON-LD (correct format)
Person schema on homepage with 5-platform sameAs array
Service schema on 3 core service pages with provider linkback
/web-developer-davao/ Person schema has PostalAddress and Wikidata areaServed reference
Blog, ContactPage, CollectionPage, WebApplication schema types implemented

findings.title: Stale Deployment — 4 Pages Schema Not Live
findings.description: hire-web-developer-philippines, website-design-davao-city, small-business-web-design-philippines, mobile-app-developer-davao all have valid JSON-LD in compiled out/ but are not served by the live site.
findings.recommendation: Trigger a fresh production deploy. Zero code changes needed.

findings.title: Missing WebSite, ProfessionalService, and AggregateRating Schema
findings.description: No WebSite entity (Knowledge Panel), no ProfessionalService/LocalBusiness (local pack), no AggregateRating (star ratings in SERPs).
findings.recommendation: Replace homepage Person schema with 3-entity graph. See findings/schema.md for complete JSON-LD.

findings.title: jobTitle Inconsistency Across 4 Pages
findings.description: 4 different jobTitle values: 'Full Stack Developer', 'Senior Full Stack Developer', 'Senior Full Stack Web Developer', 'Full Stack Engineer'. Weakens entity confidence.
findings.recommendation: Standardize to 'Full Stack Developer' across all page.tsx schema definitions.

findings.title: Homepage Person Missing @id and address
findings.description: No @id prevents Knowledge Graph entity anchoring. No address misses key local intent signal on highest-traffic page.
findings.recommendation: Add @id: 'https://algermakiputin.com#person' and PostalAddress for Davao City.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: Next.js static export provides good TTFB baseline
Cloudflare CDN provides edge caching
Review images already in WebP format

findings.title: 13-15 Render-Blocking Scripts
findings.description: Estimated 300-600ms LCP/FCP penalty on 4G mobile. All non-critical scripts are synchronous in <head>.
findings.recommendation: Use next/script strategy='afterInteractive' for analytics. Add defer to remaining scripts.

findings.title: Hero Image Served as JPEG (LCP Candidate)
findings.description: /images/profile.jpg is the likely LCP element. JPEG format with no preload or fetchpriority.
findings.recommendation: Use next/image <Image priority={true}> — auto-converts to WebP, adds fetchpriority=high.

findings.title: 6 Icon Images in PNG Format
findings.description: All technology icon images (/icons/*.png) are unoptimized PNG. Should be WebP or SVG.
findings.recommendation: Convert to WebP via next/image, or replace with inline SVG for icons.

findings.title: Blog Images Missing Dimensions — CLS Risk
findings.description: 9 of 11 blog listing images have no width/height. Layout shifts as images load, worsening CLS.
findings.recommendation: Use Next.js <Image> component on blog listing thumbnails.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness (GEO)
what_works: Next.js SSR — AI crawlers read all content without JavaScript
Strong sameAs array with 5 platforms including YouTube (0.737 citation correlation)
Name 'Alger Makiputin' is unique — zero disambiguation risk
Sitemap present and well-structured
Wikidata Davao City @id reference in /web-developer-davao/ areaServed

findings.title: /llms.txt Does Not Exist
findings.description: HTTP 404. Highest-leverage single missing file for AI search visibility. Tells AI systems exactly how to describe the site.
findings.recommendation: Create public/llms.txt with 143-word identity paragraph. Template in findings/geo.md.

findings.title: No FAQPage Schema
findings.description: FAQ content exists on 2 pages but zero FAQPage JSON-LD. Primary mechanism for AI Overviews and Perplexity to extract direct answers. Note: no longer generates Google rich results since May 2026.
findings.recommendation: Add FAQPage schema to /web-developer-davao/ and /hire-web-developer-philippines/.

findings.title: No Bio Paragraph on Homepage
findings.description: Homepage H1 is a marketing tagline. AI models cannot extract identity or location from it. Stats appear as UI widgets, not citable prose.
findings.recommendation: Add 150-word bio paragraph to homepage. Template in ACTION-PLAN.md Phase 2.4.

findings.title: All Passages Below 134-Word AI Citation Threshold
findings.description: FAQ answers are 25-38 words each. Optimal range is 134-167 words for AI citation likelihood.
findings.recommendation: Expand each FAQ answer to 3-4 sentences with context. Priority: pricing question ('₱30,000-₱80,000').

findings.title: No Wikidata Entity
findings.description: No Wikidata person stub for Alger Makiputin. Wikidata has no notability requirements.
findings.recommendation: Create at wikidata.org: P31=human, P106=software developer, P27=Philippines, P937=Davao City, P856=algermakiputin.com.

categories.name: SXO / Search Experience
what_works: Correct multi-tier page architecture (local/national/global landing pages)
Local signals on Davao page are strong (PHP pricing, on-site availability, local industries)
Service pages have correct intent alignment for target keywords
Clear CTAs and measurable trust signals on indexed pages

findings.title: Indexation Crisis — 20 of 23 Pages Not in Google's Index
findings.description: site:algermakiputin.com returns only 3 results. All targeted service pages are invisible to Google. Correct page types exist but cannot rank because Google does not know they exist.
findings.recommendation: Use Google Search Console URL Inspection to request indexing for 5 priority pages. Verify server-rendered HTML contains content via view-source:.

findings.title: No Dedicated React Native Page
findings.description: No dedicated page for 'react native developer philippines freelance' — a high-value specific keyword. Mobile app page buries React Native in body copy. Intent match score: 0/10.
findings.recommendation: Create /react-native-developer-philippines/ as standalone page.

findings.title: No Google Business Profile
findings.description: Most impactful local trust signal completely absent. Competitors with GBP (address, phone, hours, reviews) consistently outrank for local Davao queries.
findings.recommendation: Claim and verify Google Business Profile for Davao City. Takes ~1 week for postcard verification.

findings.title: Not Listed on Key Local Directories
findings.description: TechBehemoths (ranks #9) and Konigle (ranks #5) for 'web development services davao' do not list the site.
findings.recommendation: Submit free listings to both directories.

findings.title: GitHub Pages Old Portfolio Diluting Brand
findings.description: algermakiputin.github.io/portfolio/ still appears in branded searches, splitting authority consolidation.
findings.recommendation: Add prominent redirect banner to old portfolio pointing to algermakiputin.com.

categories.name: Images
what_works: 0 images missing alt text across all audited pages
Review images already in WebP format

findings.title: Hero and Icon Images in JPEG/PNG Format
findings.description: /images/profile.jpg (JPEG LCP candidate) and 6 icon PNGs not converted to WebP.
findings.recommendation: Use next/image <Image> component — auto-converts to WebP and enforces dimensions.

findings.title: Blog Listing Images Missing Dimensions
findings.description: 9 of 11 blog thumbnail images have no width/height attributes, causing CLS.
findings.recommendation: Use next/image on blog listing component.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Request indexing for 5 service pages in Google Search Console
Fix title tag duplicate brand suffix in Next.js metadata template
Redeploy build to restore schema on 4 unserved pages
Add HTTP security headers to Cloudflare _headers file
Filter blog feed to remove crypto/off-topic posts
Create /about/ page with professional bio and credentials
Create /projects/ or /case-studies/ page with 3+ case studies

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Replace homepage schema with 3-entity graph (Person + WebSite + ProfessionalService + AggregateRating)
Standardize jobTitle to 'Full Stack Developer' across all pages
Create /llms.txt with 143-word identity paragraph
Add 150-word bio paragraph to homepage
Fix render-blocking scripts using next/script afterInteractive strategy
Expand /web-development-services/ to 800+ words with pricing, FAQ, case study
Add FAQPage schema to Davao and Philippines landing pages
Add fetchpriority='high' and convert profile image to WebP via next/image

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Claim Google Business Profile for Davao City
Create arc.dev developer profile with link back to personal site
Submit free listings to TechBehemoths and Konigle
Create /react-native-developer-philippines/ standalone page
Create Wikidata person entity for Alger Makiputin
Add privacy policy page and footer link
Add BreadcrumbList schema to all service pages
Add redirect banner to old GitHub Pages portfolio

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Monitor Google Search Console Coverage report for indexation progress
Track keyword positions monthly for 5 target queries
Publish 4+ technical blog posts as on-site content
Implement IndexNow for Bing/Yandex ping on deploy
Update stats in schema/copy as projects/clients grow
